---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new rule, prompt, capability, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Brief description of the feature.

## Use Case

When would this be used? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Change

- **Type:** Rule / Prompt / Decision logic / Sample / Documentation / Other
- **Location:** (e.g., aws-architecture-decision-engine.md, tagging-compliance.yaml)
- **Details:** Describe the change

## Operating Mode

- [ ] Repo-Driven
- [ ] Spec-Driven
- [ ] Both

## Scope

- [ ] AWS-only (no Azure/GCP)
- [ ] Aligns with architect-mindset and design principles
